title: Personal Website
description: The source code for this website, built with Node.js.

title: Token Contract Viewer
description: A web app for deploying simulated token contracts and interacting with their ABIs.

title: Digital Transfer Agent Demo
description: The Digital Transfer Agent is a tokenized equities issuance and management platform that demonstrates how traditional securities operations (listing, transfer agency, corporate actions, and shareholder services) can be represented on-chain using ERC-20-compatible token contracts.

title: Transfer Agent Platform
description: A frontend application demonstrating the features of a transfer agent for tokenized equities, with handling for share capital, corporate actions, and proxy voting alongside an intelligence dashboard.
